title: Ballerina
tmdbOverview: Grieving the loss of a best friend she couldn't protect, an ex-bodyguard sets out to fulfill her dear friend's last wish: sweet revenge.
synopsis: Ballerina is a 2023 action and thriller film from South Korea. It carries a 6.3 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2020s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
